task: I need to text a coworker about covering my section for the last hour because something came up. Can you help me put together a message that gets the point across clearly and doesn’t overcomplicate it?

turns.agent_response:
Sure — try:

**“Something came up. Can you cover my section for the last hour?”**

If you want it a little more direct:
**“I’ve got something I need to handle — can you take my section for the last hour?”**

If you want, I can make it **more casual** or **more firm**.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah, that works. Short and clear.

I’d probably send:

“Something came up — can you cover my section for the last hour?”

No need to dress it up.
